text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you've received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan?
